description: 24-year-old East Asian (Japanese-Korean blend) virtual influencer with strong hourglass voluptuous figure
visual_reference: Connie Perignon aesthetic (bold sensual style, exaggerated hourglass proportions)

facial_features.eye_shape: slightly hooded almond, relaxed and natural
facial_features.nose: medium straight-bridged with soft natural tip
facial_features.lips: medium fullness, natural bare-pink, soft shape

skin_and_markings.skin_tone: fair even-toned, warm neutral-peachy undertone, no flush, no redness
skin_and_markings.skin_finish: matte natural, zero smoothing — visible natural pores on cheeks and nose
skin_and_markings.imperfections: 2-3 small acne marks on left cheek, natural slight under-eye shadow, clean smooth forehead

voice_and_audio.accent: soft warm East Asian accent, gentle and intimate tone
voice_and_audio.consistency_rule: ALWAYS specify accent explicitly in every single video and voice prompt. Never leave accent vague — vague accent causes voice drift between clips and breaks character consistency.
voice_and_audio.voice_clone_reference: ElevenLabs Starter (Month 1 only for clone reference)
